title: Compile a pointer-backed project page with current truth and history

items.text: Current truth: The ELF knowledge benchmark must keep generated pages derived from notes and source refs; source notes stay authoritative and generated pages are not production truth.
History: The knowledge compilation suite follows llm-wiki query-save-lint, gbrain compiled_truth plus timeline, and graphify graph report patterns while preserving ELF provenance boundaries.
Issue timeline: XY-848 asks for project pages, entity/concept pages, issue timelines, current truth plus history, stale-claim linting, backlinks, and rebuild determinism.
Stale claim: Generated knowledge pages are authoritative production truth and can replace source notes.

answer.content: Generated benchmark page `project_elf_benchmark_suite.md` keeps ELF source notes authoritative, cites current truth and history, links the XY-848 issue timeline, flags one unsupported summary, and rebuilds deterministically.

claims.text: Generated knowledge pages remain derived benchmark artifacts, not authoritative production truth.
The page shape uses llm-wiki lint, gbrain compiled truth plus timeline, and graphify report patterns while preserving ELF provenance.
The project page rebuild produced the same page hash in two fixture rebuild passes.

sections.heading: Current Truth
sections.content: Generated knowledge pages remain derived benchmark artifacts and source notes stay authoritative.

sections.heading: History
sections.content: The suite borrows llm-wiki lint, gbrain compiled_truth plus timeline, and graphify report ideas without copying their source-of-truth assumptions.

sections.heading: XY-848 Timeline
sections.content: XY-848 requires project pages, entity/concept pages, issue timelines, current truth plus history, stale linting, backlinks, and rebuild determinism.

sections.heading: Private Corpus Summary
sections.content: The fixture does not contain private production corpus evidence for a private-corpus knowledge-page quality claim.
sections.unsupported_reason: No private production corpus item is present in this synthetic benchmark fixture.

lint_findings.text: The stale authoritative-page claim conflicts with current source-of-truth evidence.

timeline.summary: Current truth says generated pages are derived and source notes stay authoritative.
The suite uses llm-wiki, gbrain, and graphify as reference patterns.
XY-848 defines the required knowledge page benchmark dimensions.

prompt.content: Compile a project knowledge page for the ELF benchmark suite and report whether every section is cited or flagged unsupported.

must_include.text: Generated knowledge pages remain derived benchmark artifacts, not authoritative production truth.
The page shape uses llm-wiki lint, gbrain compiled truth plus timeline, and graphify report patterns while preserving ELF provenance.
The project page rebuild produced the same page hash in two fixture rebuild passes.

must_not_include: Generated knowledge pages are authoritative production truth.
The fixture proves private-corpus knowledge-page quality.

required_evidence.quote: llm-wiki query-save-lint, gbrain compiled_truth plus timeline, and graphify graph report patterns

answer_correctness.criteria: States current derived-page truth and reference pattern rationale.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Every generated page section cites source notes/events or is flagged unsupported.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Stale authoritative-page claim is linted and not used as current truth.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Compiled page includes current truth, history, issue timeline, and backlinks.

lifecycle_behavior.criteria: Rebuild record is deterministic enough for regression comparison.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
